'''Keesi''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] arms dealer operating during the early years of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. He worked with fellow Rodians [[Gredori]], [[Aald]] and [[Vosso]]. Keesi was known to travel on the space barge ''[[Lost Lady]]'', which often made illicit smuggling trips between [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]] and [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]].

{{Char-stub}}
